title: Files, Directories, Links, and Metadata · Terminal Trace: Stat Metadata Time
summary: Prepare a service workspace while preserving names, metadata, link intent, and the ability to reverse every operation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the linux stat metadata time increment in a reversible filesystem-change plan and evidence tree. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret size, allocation, ownership, mode, inode, timestamps, and link count with stat and ls evidence.
Predict inode, path, deletion, filesystem, and permission behavior for hard and symbolic links.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.

content.code:
set -o noglob
printf 'target=%q\n' "reports/run-2.txt"
mkdir -p -- reports
touch -- "reports/run-2.txt"
stat -- "reports/run-2.txt"
